title: Voluspa 44-66: Ragnarok
description: The end of the world: the gods march to their final battle, the sun turns black, the earth sinks — and rises again, green and renewed.
introduction: The end of the world: the gods march to their final battle, the sun turns black, the earth sinks — and rises again, green and renewed.

translation.original_text: Brœðr munu berjask ok at bönum verðask, munu systrungar sifjum spilla.
translation.text: Brothers shall fight and slay each other, cousins shall break the bonds of kinship.

translation.original_text: Sól tér sortna, sígr fold í mar, hverfa af himni heiðar stjörnur.
translation.text: The sun turns black, earth sinks into the sea, the bright stars vanish from the sky.
